case_title: JULIO, NILKA et al VS TOBIN, NEIL INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-07-2003, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-21-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,384.56 FILED BY TOBIN, NEIL INDIVIDUALLY NAUGHTEN, GABRIELLE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JULIO, NILKA HIRASA, CHERYL HEINRICH, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JULIO, NILKA HIRASA, CHERYL HEINRICH, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOBIN, NEIL INDIVIDUALLY NAUGHTEN, GABRIELLE $1,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,042.00, PAT O'SHEA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. GABRIELLE NAUGHTEN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
